```{r nonlinear_pref_HR, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.align='center'}
# Coding Ability (Top vs Bottom Coding Score or Test Cases) - URM
# ==============================================================================

hr_urm_test_split <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ urm_tech | 
                           resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                           split = ~top_half_coder, cluster = ~responseid,
                           data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR" & s3_outside_res == 0])

hr_urm_test_df  <- extract_split_data(hr_urm_test_split,  "HR",       test_tiers)

p_hr_urm_test  <- make_split_plot(hr_urm_test_df,  "HR: URM Premium by Coding Ability",  test_colors, test_shapes, show_y = TRUE)


# ==============================================================================
# Output
# ==============================================================================
(p_hr_gpa + p_hr_test + plot_layout(guides = "collect")) /
(p_hr_urm_gpa + p_hr_urm_test + plot_layout(guides = "collect")) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```

\newpage
#### Engineer

```{r nonlinear_pref_Eng, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.align='center'}

# ==============================================================================
# (GPA) High / Mid / Low - Six Demographics
# ==============================================================================
eng_gpa_split <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ i(race_gender, ref="White_Male") | 
                       resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                       split = ~gpa_tier3, cluster = ~responseid,
                       data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s3_outside_res == 0])

gpa_tier3s <- c("Low GPA", "Mid GPA", "Top GPA")
gpa_colors <- c("Low GPA" = "black", "Mid GPA" = "steelblue", "Top GPA" = "indianred1")
gpa_shapes <- c("Low GPA" = 16, "Mid GPA" = 15, "Top GPA" = 17)

eng_gpa_df <- extract_split_data(eng_gpa_split, "Engineer", gpa_tier3s)

# gpa_tier2s <- c("Non_Elite_GPA", "Elite_GPA")
# gpa_colors <- c("Non_Elite_GPA" = "black", "Elite_GPA" = "steelblue")
# gpa_shapes <- c("Non_Elite_GPA" = 16, "Elite_GPA" = 15)
# 
# eng_gpa_df <- extract_split_data(eng_gpa_split, "Engineer", gpa_tier2s)

p_eng_gpa <- make_split_plot(eng_gpa_df, "Engineer: Premium by GPA Tier", gpa_colors, gpa_shapes, show_y = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# (GPA) High / Mid / Low - URM
# ==============================================================================

eng_urm_gpa_split <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ urm_tech | 
                           resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                           split = ~gpa_tier3, cluster = ~responseid,
                           data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s3_outside_res == 0])

eng_urm_gpa_df  <- extract_split_data(eng_urm_gpa_split, "Engineer", gpa_tier3s)

p_eng_urm_gpa  <- make_split_plot(eng_urm_gpa_df, "Engineer: URM Premium by GPA Tier",  gpa_colors,  gpa_shapes,  show_y = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# Coding Ability (Top vs Bottom Coding Score or Test Cases) - Six Demographics
# ==============================================================================
eng_test_split <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ i(race_gender, ref="White_Male") | 
                        resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                        split = ~top_half_coder, cluster = ~responseid,
                        data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s3_outside_res == 0])

test_tiers <- c("Bottom 50% Coders", "Top 50% Coders")
test_colors <- c("Bottom 50% Coders" = "black", "Top 50% Coders" = "indianred1")
test_shapes <- c("Bottom 50% Coders" = 16, "Top 50% Coders" = 17)

eng_test_df <- extract_split_data(eng_test_split, "Engineer", test_tiers)

p_eng_test <- make_split_plot(eng_test_df, "Engineer: Premium by Coding Ability", test_colors, test_shapes, show_y = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# Coding Ability (Top vs Bottom Coding Score or Test Cases) - URM
# ==============================================================================
eng_urm_test_split <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ urm_tech | 
                            resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                            split = ~top_half_coder, cluster = ~responseid,
                            data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s3_outside_res == 0])

eng_urm_test_df <- extract_split_data(eng_urm_test_split, "Engineer", test_tiers)

p_eng_urm_test <- make_split_plot(eng_urm_test_df, "Engineer: URM Premium by Coding Ability", test_colors, test_shapes, show_y = FALSE)


# ==============================================================================
# Output
# ==============================================================================
(p_eng_gpa + p_eng_test + plot_layout(guides = "collect")) /
(p_eng_urm_gpa + p_eng_urm_test + plot_layout(guides = "collect")) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "top")


```

\newpage
###### (Eng) Signal from GPA vs Coding Test

```{r Horserace, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, results='asis'}

eng_horse_race <- feols(sc_overall_z ~ urm_tech + urm_tech:test_case_z + urm_tech:gpa_z | 
                        resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
                        cluster = ~responseid,
                        data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s3_outside_res == 0])

tbl <- etable(
  eng_horse_race,
  tex = TRUE, style.tex = style.tex("aer"),
  fitstat = c("n", "ar2"),
  drop.section = "fixef",
  digits = 3, se.below = TRUE,
  dict = c("urm_tech"    = "URM",
           "test_case_z" = "Coding Score (Z)",
           "gpa_z"       = "GPA (Z)"),
  signif.code = c("***" = 0.01, "**" = 0.05, "*" = 0.1),
  title = "Signal from GPA vs. Coding Test: Engineer (Non-blind)",
  notes = "Standard errors clustered by respondent. Sample restricted to non-blind condition, Engineer role."
)

# Inject FE rows manually before \bottomrule
tbl <- sub(
  "\\\\bottomrule",
  "Resume FE & $\\\\checkmark$ \\\\\\\\\nRespondent FE & $\\\\checkmark$ \\\\\\\\\nPosition FE & $\\\\checkmark$ \\\\\\\\\n\\\\bottomrule",
  tbl
)

tbl <- gsub("\\\\par \\\\raggedright", "\\\\par \\\\centering \\\\footnotesize", tbl)

cat(tbl)

rm(eng_horse_race, tbl)

```


\clearpage
### Heterogeneity by Firm Size
```{r stage_pref_heterogeneity_by_firmsize, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, out.width="100%", fig.width=14, fig.height=4.5, fig.align='center', results='asis'}

## Regressions: Heterogeneity by Firm Size
## Note: Small firms are the reference group (omitted)
## Only includes respondents with valid firm size responses (s2_firm_size != 96)

  #### HR
  models_hr_hetero_firmsize <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(race_gender, firm_size_mid, ref = "White_Male") +
        i(race_gender, firm_size_large, ref = "White_Male")
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR" & s2_firm_size != 96],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_firmsize) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  #### Engineer
  models_eng_hetero_firmsize <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(race_gender, firm_size_mid, ref = "White_Male") +
        i(race_gender, firm_size_large, ref = "White_Male")
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & s2_firm_size != 96],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_firmsize) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

## Calculate respondent counts for labeling
resp_counts_hetero_firmsize <- firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & s2_firm_size != 96, .(
  N_HR = uniqueN(responseid[role == "HR"]),
  N_Eng = uniqueN(responseid[role == "Eng"])
), by = .(
  firm_size = fcase(
    firm_size_small == 1, "small",
    firm_size_mid == 1, "mid",
    firm_size_large == 1, "large"
  )
)]

## Create plots for each outcome
  #### Overall
  p_ovr_hr_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_hr_hetero_firmsize$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_eng_hetero_firmsize$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "Eng")
  
  #### Coding
  p_coding_hr_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_hr_hetero_firmsize$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_eng_hetero_firmsize$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "Eng")
  
  #### Fit
  p_fit_hr_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_hr_hetero_firmsize$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_eng_hetero_firmsize$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "Eng")
  
  #### Stay
  p_stay_hr_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_hr_hetero_firmsize$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_eng_hetero_firmsize$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "Eng")
  
  #### Advance (HR only)
  p_advance_hr_firmsize <- plot_heterogeneity_firmsize(models_hr_hetero_firmsize$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_firmsize, "HR")

## Print plots
suppressWarnings({
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_firmsize, p_ovr_eng_firmsize, "Overall (Z) by Firm Size"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_firmsize, p_coding_eng_firmsize, "Coding (Z) by Firm Size"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_firmsize, p_fit_eng_firmsize, "Fit (Z) by Firm Size"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_firmsize, p_stay_eng_firmsize, "Stay (Z) by Firm Size"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_firmsize, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM) by Firm Size"))
})

## Clean up
rm(models_hr_hetero_firmsize, models_eng_hetero_firmsize,
   resp_counts_hetero_firmsize,
   p_ovr_hr_firmsize, p_ovr_eng_firmsize,
   p_coding_hr_firmsize, p_coding_eng_firmsize,
   p_fit_hr_firmsize, p_fit_eng_firmsize,
   p_stay_hr_firmsize, p_stay_eng_firmsize,
   p_advance_hr_firmsize
)
```


```{r, include = FALSE, eval = FALSE, echo = TRUE}

rm(p_empty,
   total_effects_lincom_gender, total_effects_lincom_gender_collapsedonrace,
   total_effects_lincom_race, total_effects_lincom_race_collapsedongender,
   total_effects_lincom_racegender, total_effects_lincom_detailed_race_gender,
   total_effects_lincom_firmsize, 
   total_effects_lincom_dei,
   plot_heterogeneity_gender, plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace,
   plot_heterogeneity_race, plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender,
   plot_heterogeneity_racegender, plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender,
   plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender,
   plot_heterogeneity_firmsize,
   plot_heterogeneity_dei,
   plot_simple_concordance,
   hetero_side_by_side_plots
)

```

































<!-- ##### ##### ##### ##### ##### ARCHIVED: Heterogeneity in Preferences ##### ##### ##### ##### ##### -->


<!-- ## By Race -->
<!-- Note: Concordance graphs drop responses by demographic groups not represented in the resume's hypothetical names. (i.e. Drops responses by Blacks) -->

```{r stage_pref_heterogeneity_by_race, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE, out.width="100%", fig.width=14, fig.height=10, fig.align='center', results='asis'}

## Regressions: Heterogeneity by Respondent Race

  #### HR
  models_hr_hetero_race <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_asian + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_hispanic + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_black + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_raceother | 
        resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_race) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_asian + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_hispanic + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_black + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_raceother | 
        resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  models_hr_concordance_race  <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ concordance_race | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="HR"], vcov=~responseid)
    ))
  names(models_hr_concordance_race) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  #### Engineer
  models_eng_hetero_race <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_asian + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_hispanic + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_black + 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") * resp_raceother | 
        resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_race) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")
  
  models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_asian + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_hispanic + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_black + 
        i(race, ref = "White") * resp_raceother | 
        resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

  models_eng_concordance_race <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ concordance_race | resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="Eng"], vcov=~responseid)
    ))
  names(models_eng_concordance_race) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")
  
## Calculate respondent counts for labeling
resp_counts_hetero_race <- firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind", .(
  N_HR = uniqueN(responseid[role == "HR"]),
  N_Eng = uniqueN(responseid[role == "Eng"])
), by = .(
  resp_race = fcase(
    resp_white == 1, "White",
    resp_asian == 1, "Asian", 
    resp_hispanic == 1, "Hispanic",
    resp_black == 1, "Black",
    default = "Other"
  )
)][resp_race != "Other"]


## Create plots for each outcome
  #### Overall
  p_ovr_hr_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_hr_hetero_race$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_eng_hetero_race$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_ovr_hr_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_ovr_race_concordance <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_race$sc_overall_z, models_eng_concordance_race$sc_overall_z, "Overall (Z) - Collapsed on Concordance (Race) - Includes only Wh/As/Hp Respondents")
  
  #### Coding
  p_coding_hr_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_hr_hetero_race$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_eng_hetero_race$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_coding_hr_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_coding_race_concordance <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_race$sc_coding_z, models_eng_concordance_race$sc_coding_z, "Coding (Z) - Collapsed on Concordance (Race) - Includes only Wh/As/Hp Respondents")

  #### Fit
  p_fit_hr_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_hr_hetero_race$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_eng_hetero_race$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_fit_hr_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_fit_race_concordance <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_race$sc_fit_z, models_eng_concordance_race$sc_fit_z, "Fit (Z) - Collapsed on Concordance (Race) - Includes only Wh/As/Hp Respondents")

  #### Stay
  p_stay_hr_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_hr_hetero_race$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_eng_hetero_race$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_stay_hr_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "Eng")
  p_stay_race_concordance <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_race$sc_stay_z, models_eng_concordance_race$sc_stay_z, "Stay (Z) - Collapsed on Concordance (Race) - Includes only Wh/As/Hp Respondents")

  #### Advance
  p_advance_hr_race <- plot_heterogeneity_race(models_hr_hetero_race$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_advance_hr_race_collapsedongender <- plot_heterogeneity_race_collapsedongender(models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_race, "HR")
  p_advance_race_concordance <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_race$sc_advance, NULL, title = "Advance (LPM) - Concordance (Race) - Includes only Wh/As/Hp Respondents"
)
  p_empty <- ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "Engineers: Not Measured", size = 5, color = "gray50") + theme_void()
  
suppressWarnings({
  
  # --- 1. Overall ---
  # Create Layouts
  p_conc_ovr_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_ovr_race_concordance, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_mid_ovr <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_ovr_eng_race_collapsedongender, "Overall (Z) - Collapsed on Gender")
  p_bot_ovr <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_race, p_ovr_eng_race, "Overall (Z)")

  # Stack and Print
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_ovr_centered, p_mid_ovr, p_bot_ovr, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1, 1)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # --- 2. Coding ---
  p_conc_cod_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_coding_race_concordance, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_mid_cod <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_coding_eng_race_collapsedongender, "Coding (Z) - Collapsed on Gender")
  p_bot_cod <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_race, p_coding_eng_race, "Coding (Z)")

  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_cod_centered, p_mid_cod, p_bot_cod, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1, 1)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # --- 3. Fit ---
  p_conc_fit_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_fit_race_concordance, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_mid_fit <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_fit_eng_race_collapsedongender, "Fit (Z) - Collapsed on Gender")
  p_bot_fit <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_race, p_fit_eng_race, "Fit (Z)")

  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_fit_centered, p_mid_fit, p_bot_fit, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1, 1)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # --- 4. Stay ---
  p_conc_stay_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_stay_race_concordance, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_mid_stay <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_stay_eng_race_collapsedongender, "Stay (Z) - Collapsed on Gender")
  p_bot_stay <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_race, p_stay_eng_race, "Stay (Z)")

  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_stay_centered, p_mid_stay, p_bot_stay, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1, 1)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # --- 5. Advance ---
  p_conc_adv_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_advance_race_concordance, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_mid_adv <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM) - Collapsed on Gender")
  p_bot_adv <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_race, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM)")

  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_adv_centered, p_mid_adv, p_bot_adv, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1, 1)))
})

# rm(models_hr_hetero_race, models_hr_hetero_race_collapsedongender, models_hr_concordance_race,
#    models_eng_hetero_race, models_eng_hetero_race_collapsedongender, models_eng_concordance_race, 
#    resp_counts_hetero_race, p_ovr_hr_race, p_ovr_eng_race, p_ovr_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_ovr_eng_race_collapsedongender, p_ovr_race_concordance,
#    p_coding_hr_race, p_coding_eng_race, p_coding_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_coding_eng_race_collapsedongender, p_coding_race_concordance,
#    p_fit_hr_race, p_fit_eng_race, p_fit_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_fit_eng_race_collapsedongender, p_fit_race_concordance,
#    p_stay_hr_race, p_stay_eng_race, p_stay_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_stay_eng_race_collapsedongender, p_stay_race_concordance,
#    p_advance_hr_race, p_advance_hr_race_collapsedongender, p_advance_race_concordance, 
#    p_mid_ovr, p_bot_ovr, p_conc_ovr_centered,
#    p_mid_cod, p_bot_cod, p_conc_cod_centered, 
#    p_mid_fit, p_bot_fit, p_conc_fit_centered,
#    p_mid_stay, p_bot_stay, p_conc_stay_centered,
#    p_mid_adv, p_bot_adv, p_conc_adv_centered)

```

<!-- \clearpage -->
<!-- ## By Gender -->
<!-- Note: Concordance graphs drop responses by demographic groups not represented in the resume's hypothetical names. (i.e. Drops responses by Nonbinary) -->

```{r stage_pref_heterogeneity_by_gender, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE, out.width="100%", fig.width=14, fig.height=4.5, fig.align='center', results='asis'}

## Regressions: Heterogeneity by Respondent Gender
  
  #### HR
  models_hr_concordance_gender  <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(sc_overall_z ~ concordance_race | resume_index + responseid + r_do, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="HR"], vcov=~responseid)
    ))
  models_eng_concordance_gender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(sc_overall_z ~ concordance_race | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="Eng"], vcov=~responseid)
  ))

  models_hr_hetero_gender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(race_gender, resp_male, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_gender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(gender, ref = "Male") + 
        i(gender, resp_male, ref = "Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")
  
  #### Engineer
  models_eng_hetero_gender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(race_gender, resp_male, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_gender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")
  
  models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ 
        i(gender, ref = "Male") + 
        i(gender, resp_male, ref = "Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

## Calculate respondent counts for labeling
resp_counts_hetero_gender <- firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind", .(
  N_HR = uniqueN(responseid[role == "HR"]),
  N_Eng = uniqueN(responseid[role == "Eng"])
), by = .(
  resp_gender = ifelse(resp_male == 1, "Male", "Female")
)]

## Create plots for each outcome
  #### Overall
  p_ovr_hr_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_hr_hetero_gender$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_eng_hetero_gender$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  p_ovr_hr_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  
  #### Coding
  p_coding_hr_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_hr_hetero_gender$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_eng_hetero_gender$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  p_coding_hr_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  
  #### Fit
  p_fit_hr_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_hr_hetero_gender$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_eng_hetero_gender$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  p_fit_hr_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  
  #### Stay
  p_stay_hr_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_hr_hetero_gender$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_eng_hetero_gender$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  p_stay_hr_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "Eng")
  
  #### Advance
  p_advance_hr_gender <- plot_heterogeneity_gender(models_hr_hetero_gender$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")
  p_advance_hr_gender_collapsedonrace <- plot_heterogeneity_gender_collapsedonrace(models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_gender, "HR")

## Print plots
suppressWarnings({
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_ovr_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, "Overall (Z) - Collapsed on Race / Concordance - Includes only M/F respondents"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_gender, p_ovr_eng_gender, "Overall (Z)"))
  
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_coding_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, "Coding (Z) - Collapsed on Race / Concordance - Includes only M/F respondents"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_gender, p_coding_eng_gender, "Coding (Z)"))
  
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_fit_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, "Fit (Z) - Collapsed on Race / Concordance - Includes only M/F respondents"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_gender, p_fit_eng_gender, "Fit (Z)"))
  
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_stay_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, "Stay (Z) - Collapsed on Race / Concordance - Includes only M/F respondents"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_gender, p_stay_eng_gender, "Stay (Z)"))
  
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM) - Collapsed on Race / Concordance - Includes only M/F respondents"))
  print(hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_gender, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM)"))
})


rm(models_hr_concordance_gender, models_eng_concordance_gender, 
   models_hr_hetero_gender, models_hr_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   models_eng_hetero_gender, models_eng_hetero_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   resp_counts_hetero_gender,
   p_ovr_hr_gender, p_ovr_eng_gender, p_ovr_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_ovr_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   p_coding_hr_gender, p_coding_eng_gender, p_coding_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_coding_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   p_fit_hr_gender, p_fit_eng_gender, p_fit_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_fit_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   p_stay_hr_gender, p_stay_eng_gender, p_stay_hr_gender_collapsedonrace, p_stay_eng_gender_collapsedonrace, 
   p_advance_hr_gender, p_advance_hr_gender_collapsedonrace
)
```

<!-- \clearpage -->
<!-- ## By Race_Gender -->
<!-- Note: Concordance graphs drop responses by demographic groups not represented in the resume's hypothetical names. (i.e. Drops responses by Blacks, Nonbinary) -->

```{r stage_pref_heterogeneity_racegender, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE, out.width="100%", fig.width=14, fig.height=10, fig.align='center', results='asis'}

# --- 1. Regressions ---

  # A. Concordance Models (Top: Binary Match vs. No Match)
  models_hr_concordance_racegender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ concordance_race_gender | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="HR"], vcov=~responseid)
  ))
  names(models_hr_concordance_racegender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")

  models_eng_concordance_racegender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ concordance_race_gender | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="Eng"], vcov=~responseid)
  ))
  names(models_eng_concordance_racegender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

  # B. Full Interaction Models (Bottom: Original Detailed Breakdown)
  models_hr_hetero_racegender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
      feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(resp_race_gender, race_gender, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_racegender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")

  models_eng_hetero_racegender <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
      feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ 
        i(race_gender, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(resp_race_gender, race_gender, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & resp_race_gender != "Other"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_racegender) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

# --- 2. Calculate Counts for Labels (FIXED: Filter out NAs) ---
  resp_counts_hetero_racegender <- firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & !is.na(resp_race_gender) & resp_race_gender != "Other", .(
    N_HR = uniqueN(responseid[role == "HR"]),
    N_Eng = uniqueN(responseid[role == "Eng"])
  ), by = .(resp_race_gender)]

# --- 3. Generate Plots ---
  
  #### Overall
  p_ovr_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_racegender$sc_overall_z, models_eng_concordance_racegender$sc_overall_z, "Overall (Z) - Concordance Premium (Race & Gender)")
  p_ovr_hr <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_hr_hetero_racegender$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_eng_hetero_racegender$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "Eng")

  #### Coding
  p_cod_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_racegender$sc_coding_z, models_eng_concordance_racegender$sc_coding_z, "Coding (Z) - Concordance Premium (Race & Gender)")
  p_cod_hr <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_hr_hetero_racegender$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "HR")
  p_cod_eng <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_eng_hetero_racegender$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "Eng")

  #### Fit
  p_fit_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_racegender$sc_fit_z, models_eng_concordance_racegender$sc_fit_z, "Fit (Z) - Concordance Premium (Race & Gender)")
  p_fit_hr <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_hr_hetero_racegender$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "HR")
  p_fit_eng <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_eng_hetero_racegender$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "Eng")

  #### Stay
  p_stay_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_racegender$sc_stay_z, models_eng_concordance_racegender$sc_stay_z, "Stay (Z) - Concordance Premium (Race & Gender)")
  p_stay_hr <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_hr_hetero_racegender$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "HR")
  p_stay_eng <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_eng_hetero_racegender$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "Eng")

  #### Advance (HR only for Concordance, Empty for Eng)
  p_adv_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_racegender$sc_advance, NULL, title = "Advance (LPM) - Concordance Premium (Race & Gender)")
  p_adv_hr <- plot_heterogeneity_racegender(models_hr_hetero_racegender$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_racegender, "HR")
  p_empty <- ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "Engineers: Not Measured", size = 5, color = "gray50") + theme_void()

# --- 4. Print (Two Rows Per Page) ---
suppressWarnings({
  
  # Overall
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_ovr_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr, p_ovr_eng, "Overall (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Coding
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_cod_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_cod_hr, p_cod_eng, "Coding (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Fit
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_fit_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr, p_fit_eng, "Fit (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Stay
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_stay_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr, p_stay_eng, "Stay (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Advance
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_adv_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_adv_hr, p_empty, "Advance (0/1)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
})

rm(models_hr_concordance_racegender, models_eng_concordance_racegender, 
   models_hr_hetero_racegender, models_eng_hetero_racegender, 
   resp_counts_hetero_racegender,
   p_ovr_conc, p_ovr_hr, p_ovr_eng, 
   p_cod_conc, p_cod_hr, p_cod_eng, 
   p_fit_conc, p_fit_hr, p_fit_eng, 
   p_stay_conc, p_stay_hr, p_stay_eng, 
   p_adv_conc, p_adv_hr, 
   p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction
)
```

<!-- \clearpage -->
<!-- ## By Race_Gender_Detailed -->
<!-- Note: Concordance graphs drop responses by demographic groups not represented in the resume's hypothetical names. (i.e. Drops responses by Koreans, Japanese, Pakistani) -->

```{r stage_pref_heterogeneity_detailed, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE, out.width="100%", fig.width=14, fig.height=9.5, fig.align='center', results='asis'}

# --- 1. Regressions ---

  # A. Concordance Models (Top)
  models_hr_concordance_detailed <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ concordance_race_gender_detailed | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="HR"], vcov=~responseid)
  ))
  names(models_hr_concordance_detailed) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")

  models_eng_concordance_detailed <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ concordance_race_gender_detailed | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree, 
          data = firm_long_dt[treat=="nonblind" & role=="Eng"], vcov=~responseid)
  ))
  names(models_eng_concordance_detailed) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

  # B. Full Interaction Models (Bottom)
  models_hr_hetero_detailed <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
      feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z, sc_advance) ~ 
        i(race_gender_detailed, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(resp_race_gender_detailed, race_gender_detailed, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "HR"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_hr_hetero_detailed) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z", "sc_advance")

  models_eng_hetero_detailed <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
      feols(
      c(sc_coding_z, sc_fit_z, sc_stay_z, sc_overall_z) ~ 
        i(race_gender_detailed, ref = "White_Male") + 
        i(resp_race_gender_detailed, race_gender_detailed, ref = "White_Male") 
      | resume_index + responseid + r_do_bythree,
      data = firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & role == "Eng" & resp_race_gender != "Other"],
      vcov = ~ responseid
    )
  ))
  names(models_eng_hetero_detailed) <- c("sc_coding_z", "sc_fit_z", "sc_stay_z", "sc_overall_z")

# --- 2. Calculate Counts for Labels ---
  resp_counts_hetero_detailed <- firm_long_dt[treat == "nonblind" & !is.na(resp_race_gender_detailed) & resp_race_gender_detailed != "Other", .(
    N_HR = uniqueN(responseid[role == "HR"]),
    N_Eng = uniqueN(responseid[role == "Eng"])
  ), by = .(resp_race_gender_detailed)]

# --- 3. Generate Plots ---
  
  #### Overall
  p_ovr_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_detailed$sc_overall_z, models_eng_concordance_detailed$sc_overall_z, "Overall (Z) - Concordance (Detailed Race/Gender)")
  p_ovr_hr_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_hr_hetero_detailed$sc_overall_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "HR")
  p_ovr_eng_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_eng_hetero_detailed$sc_overall_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "Eng")

  #### Coding
  p_cod_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_detailed$sc_coding_z, models_eng_concordance_detailed$sc_coding_z, "Coding (Z) - Concordance (Detailed Race/Gender)")
  p_coding_hr_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_hr_hetero_detailed$sc_coding_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "HR")
  p_coding_eng_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_eng_hetero_detailed$sc_coding_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "Eng")

  #### Fit
  p_fit_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_detailed$sc_fit_z, models_eng_concordance_detailed$sc_fit_z, "Fit (Z) - Concordance (Detailed Race/Gender)")
  p_fit_hr_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_hr_hetero_detailed$sc_fit_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "HR")
  p_fit_eng_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_eng_hetero_detailed$sc_fit_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "Eng")

  #### Stay
  p_stay_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_detailed$sc_stay_z, models_eng_concordance_detailed$sc_stay_z, "Stay (Z) - Concordance (Detailed Race/Gender)")
  p_stay_hr_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_hr_hetero_detailed$sc_stay_z, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "HR")
  p_stay_eng_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_eng_hetero_detailed$sc_stay_z, "Engineers", "Discrimination (Z)", FALSE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "Eng")

  #### Advance
  p_adv_conc <- plot_simple_concordance(models_hr_concordance_detailed$sc_advance, NULL, title = "Advance (LPM) - Concordance (Detailed Race/Gender)")
  p_advance_hr_det <- plot_heterogeneity_detailed_race_gender(models_hr_hetero_detailed$sc_advance, "Human Resources", "Discrimination (Z)", TRUE, resp_counts_hetero_detailed, "HR")  
  p_empty <- ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "Engineers: Not Measured", size = 5, color = "gray50") + theme_void()

# --- 4. Print ---
suppressWarnings({
  
  # Overall
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_ovr_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_ovr_hr_det, p_ovr_eng_det, "Overall (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Coding
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_cod_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_coding_hr_det, p_coding_eng_det, "Coding (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Fit
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_fit_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_fit_hr_det, p_fit_eng_det, "Fit (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Stay
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_stay_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_stay_hr_det, p_stay_eng_det, "Stay (Z)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
  cat("\\newpage\n")

  # Advance
  p_conc_centered <- cowplot::plot_grid(NULL, p_adv_conc, NULL, ncol=3, rel_widths=c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))
  p_full_interaction <- hetero_side_by_side_plots(p_advance_hr_det, p_empty, "Advance (0/1, LPM)")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction, ncol=1, rel_heights=c(0.4, 1.2)))
})


rm(models_hr_concordance_detailed, models_eng_concordance_detailed, 
   models_hr_hetero_detailed, models_eng_hetero_detailed, 
   resp_counts_hetero_detailed, 
   p_ovr_conc, p_ovr_hr_det, p_ovr_eng_det, 
   p_cod_conc, p_coding_hr_det, p_coding_eng_det, 
   p_fit_conc, p_fit_hr_det, p_fit_eng_det, 
   p_stay_conc, p_stay_hr_det, p_stay_eng_det, 
   p_adv_conc, p_advance_hr_det,
   p_conc_centered, p_full_interaction
)
```
